creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233791
Remove --disable-mfa from config

At some point, the SOGo configure script stopped accepting --disable-mfa.  Now, it takes --enable-mfa to enable MFA or nothing to disable effectively disable MFA.

The easiest solution is to remove the use of --disable-mfa from the configuration if the MFA option is checked off.
